positive: Stylized macro view of bioluminescent flora and crystalline geometric structures growing together. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, creating a mesmerizing mandala effect. Features deep sapphire blues, ethereal mint greens, and pops of vibrant magenta contrasted against a deep, velvety black background. Lighting should be dramatic and internal (emissive), giving the illusion of glowing life. High contrast, clean silhouettes, vector-art quality mixed with organic fluid dynamics. Ideal for seamless repeating print on apparel, detailed linework, ultra-minimalist aesthetic, octane render, 8k print quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermarks, logo, watermark, signature, artifacts, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, lowres, cross-eyed
